title: Iqbal Verse #129 — Allama Iqbal Urdu Shayari
content:
فاطمہ! تُو آبرُوئے اُمّتِ مرحوم ہے
ذرّہ ذرّہ تیری مُشتِ خاک کا معصوم ہے

— Translation —
Fatima, you are the pride of the Community ‑God bless it!
Your dust is holy, every particle of it.
meaning: "Iqbal Verse #129" by Allama Iqbal is a spiritual urdu poem consisting of 6 lines. This Urdu verse by Allama Iqbal showcases the rich tradition of South Asian poetry. The poet masterfully employs Urdu literary conventions to convey profound emotional depth. Beginning with "فاطمہ! تُو آبرُوئے اُمّتِ مرحوم ہے ذرّہ ذرّہ تیری مُشتِ خاک کا معصوم ہے...", this piece explores themes of spiritual through vivid imagery and emotional resonance. The work invites contemplation on the deeper currents of life, love, and the human condition. Allama Iqbal's celebrated body of poetry continues to inspire readers across generations and cultures, and this particular work stands as a powerful example of their artistic vision.
